summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json (an internal tracking file), which increments a version counter and records feature state. There is no evidence of any actual backend canister redeployment, Motoko code changes, deployment scripts, dfx.json updates, canister configuration changes, or any other artifact that would cause the canister tgggy-siaaa-aaaag-auegq-cai to transition from a stopped state to a running state. REQ-18 requires a functional redeployment of the backend canister, none of which is evidenced in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redeploy the backend Motoko canister so it transitions from a stopped state to a running state, enabling all query and update calls (getAllIncidents, createIncident, addUpdate, changeStatus, deleteIncident) to be accepted without IC0508 / Reject code 5 errors.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only updates project_state.json. No Motoko source files, dfx.json, deployment scripts, canister manifests, or any other artifact that would trigger or record an actual canister redeployment are present. There is no evidence the canister was started or redeployed.
